impact: This unblocks source freshness recovery by proving the target contract module parses and imports in isolation before broader freshness fixtures or classifiers are added.
summary: Add a syntax-first import guard for ppd.contracts.source_freshness with a minimal syntactically valid module target.
target_task: Task checkbox-60: Add a one-file syntax-first repair test for `ppd.contracts.source_freshness` that imports only that module and verifies Python annotations use valid assignment syntax before any broad source freshness work resumes.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
